It lies to
the cast ofViduS on the bank of (he river Dhasan. The Kunti-
bhojas were a people and their country too was called after them.
The Pariyatra mountain forms the western part of the Vindhya
range.]
^nrrr^r^ i
Saturn, tenanting the asterism Sravana, destroys king's offi-
cers, eminent Brahmins, physicians, priests and the people of
Kallnga; and while dwelling in the star Dhani§(ha, he causes the
victory of the king of Magadha and the prosperity of treasurers,
bankers and the like.
^ 1)^)1
When Saturn occupies the stars Satabhisaj and Purvabha-
drapada, physicians, poets, drunkards, traders and politicians are
afflicted; and when he stays in Uttarabhadrapada, rivers, those
who dwell on river-banks, carriage-makers, carpenters etc., women
and gold are destroyed.
^Tt TnrgcTT; I
When Saturn moves in RevatI, king's proteges, inhabitants
of the Kraunca Dvipa, autumnal crops, the Sabaras and Yavanas
come to have difficult times.
